info.name: pan afric e-commerce
info.description:
## Pan Afric E-Commerce API

This collection covers the full API surface of the **Pan Afric Store** — a multi-role e-commerce platform hosted at `https://panafrica-store.onrender.com`. It is organized into four functional modules:

### Authentication

Handles user registration and login for two distinct roles — **customers** and **merchants**. Also includes negative test cases such as login with a wrong password, login with an invalid email, and registration with an incorrect format, making it useful for both happy-path and error-handling validation.

### Products

Covers the complete product lifecycle. Merchants can create, update, and delete products, while customers can browse the catalog — listing all products, filtering by currency, searching by name, and fetching a product by ID. Role-based access control is tested here, with requests that verify customers cannot perform merchant-only operations.

### Cart

Manages the shopping cart for authenticated customers. Includes adding items to the cart, viewing the cart, and removing items. Also tests that merchants are correctly restricted from cart operations.

### Orders

Handles order management — viewing a specific order, listing all orders, and checking out the cart. Includes a negative test case to verify that unauthorized users cannot access orders that don't belong to them.

---

This collection is well-suited for functional testing, role-based access control validation, and end-to-end workflow verification of the Pan Afric e-commerce platform.

register customer response
login customer response
